infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Vedarogya uses Bluetooth to scan for and connect to your smartwatch to read live health metrics.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: Vedarogya connects to your smartwatch over Bluetooth to sync heart rate, SpO₂ and HRV in real time.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Vedarogya reads heart rate, steps, sleep and oxygen data from Apple Health to display your vitals.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Vedarogya writes wellness data back to Apple Health so your records stay in sync.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Vedarogya uses your camera so you can photograph symptoms or scan health documents for AI analysis.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Vedarogya accesses your photo library so you can share health images and lab reports with the AI assistant.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Vedarogya uses the microphone for voice input in the AI health assistant.

plugins.photosPermission: Vedarogya accesses your photo library to let you share health images with the AI assistant.
plugins.cameraPermission: Vedarogya uses the camera to photograph symptoms or scan health documents.
